Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Risk Score Operational Payment Base and Model Output User Guide │ June 2026 │ V 1.1 4 

3.0 CCW Payment Risk Score Files 

3.1 Source Data 

CMS uses multiple sources to produce the Part C and Part D risk scores. These sources are the CMS Common Medicare 
Environment (CME) tables for the enrollment and demographic data, CMS FFS claims, MA plan-submitted diagnosis 
data (from the Risk Adjustment Processing System [RAPS]), and MA
